name: Distributed Objects CAPL Functions
title: Distributed Objects CAPL Functions
description: Communication Concept | Programming with Communication Concept
tables: DISTRIBUTED OBJECTS Overview of objects and methods to work with distributed objects.
This handler is called whenever a provided method of a distributed object derived from the given interface is called.
This handler is called whenever a method of a distributed object derived from the given interface is about to be called.
This handler is called whenever a method of a distributed object derived from the given interface has returned at the consumer.
This handler is called whenever a method of a distributed object derived from the given interface is about to return its answer at the provider.
This handler is called whenever a value of the given set changes.
This handler is called whenever a value of the given set is updated.
This handler is called whenever a provided data, event, or field member transmits an announce via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a provided data, event, or field member transmits an announce via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a consumed method member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a provided method member transmits a return via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a consumed data, event, or field member transmits a subscribe via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a provided data, event, or field member transmits an unannounce via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a consumed data, event, or field member transmits an unsubscribe via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever an instance of a provided data, event, or field interface member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a consumed method member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a provided method member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a consumed data, event, or field member transmits a subscribe via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a provided data, event, or field member transmits an unannounce via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a consumed data, event, or field member transmits an unsubscribe via the CAPL binding.
This handler is called whenever a provided data, event, or field member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
Obtains an object by using a string.
Obtains a container by using a string.
Obtains a reference by using a string.
Obtains a virtual network by using a string.
Reads an attribute value from an attributable object.
Writes an attribute value at an attributable object.
Sets the announcement state of a provided data, event, or field member value that uses the CAPL binding and PublishSubscribe communication pattern with announcements.
Sets the in-parameters for a call at a provided method member that uses the CAPL binding.
Creates a new call context with the given method member prototype and request ID.
Sets the out-parameters for a returning call at a consumed method member that uses the CAPL binding.
Sets the value of an in-parameter. It is required because the normal assignment for inout-parameters only writes to the out-value.
Sets the subscription state of a consumed data, event, or field member value that uses the CAPL binding and PublishSubscribe communication pattern.
Sets a value of a consumed data, event, or field member value that uses the CAPL binding.
Adds a virtual network to the blueprint.
Removes all attributes and virtual networks from the blueprint.
Recursively copies all attributes and virtual network from the given object and its members to the blueprint.
Creates a dynamic object from the blueprint.
Gets the value of an attribute that is set at the blueprint.
Removes an attribute from the blueprint.
This method removes a virtual network from the blueprint.
Sets an attribute at the blueprint.
Creates a new object at the given index.
Replaces an object at the given index with an invalid object.
Removes an element at the end of the container.
Adds an element at the end of the container.
Triggers an update event on the member value.
Creates a dynamic object from the blueprint.
Creates a blueprint for the given interface.
Creates a blueprint for the reverse of the given interface.
Gets the value of an attribute that is set at the member blueprint.
Removes an attribute from the member blueprint.
Removes the virtual network from the member blueprint.
Sets an attribute at the member blueprint.
Sets the virtual network of the member blueprint.
Checks if the object member is connected to its assigned virtual network.
Synchronous call to a method member.
Asynchronous call to a method member.
Synchronous call to a method member.
Asynchronous call to a method member.
This is a collective operation that announces all provided members which use the publish-subscribe pattern with announcements.
This is a collective operation that connects every member of the object with its virtual network.
This is a collective operation that connects every member of the object, if it is assigned to the given virtual network.
This is a collective operation that disconnects every member of the object from its virtual network.
This is a collective operation that disconnects every member of the object, if it is assigned to the given virtual network.
Checks if every member of the object is connected to its virtual network.
Checks if every member of the object is connected, if it is assigned to the given virtual network.
This is a collective operation that subscribes all consumed members which use the publish-subscribe pattern.
This is a collective operation that unannounces all provided members which use the publish-subscribe pattern with announcements.
This is a collective operation that unsubscribes all consumed members which use the publish-subscribe pattern.
Resets the target object of the reference.
Sets the target object of the reference.
Sets the target object of the reference.
The type of objects that can have attributes.
The types of attributes for distributed objects.
This type provides static methods which are used for implementing a CAPL binding.
The corresponding CAPL type for the bytes type in vCDL.
A blueprint type for dynamically creating distributed objects.
References a container of distributed objects or references.
References a distributed object data member.
References a distributed object event member.
References a distributed object field member.
A type for creating blueprints and dynamic distributed objects.
The types of distributed object interface members.
A type for configuring the attributes and virtual network of an object blueprint member.
References a distributed object method member.
References a distributed object that is derived from the denoted interface.
References a reference to a distributed object that is derived from the given interface.
